use_codes.desc: FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH WALDENSTROM'S MACROGLOBULINEMIA

RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY MARGINAL ZONE LYMPHOMA (MZL) WHO HAVE RECEIVED AT LEAST ONE PRIOR ANTI-CD20-BASED REGIMEN

TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH SMALL LYMPHOCYTIC LYMPHOMA
TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC LYMPHOCYTIC LEUKEMIA (CLL) OR SMALL LYMPHOCYTIC LYMPHOMA (SLL) RECEIVING A MODERATE CYP3A INDUCER

indications.text:
1.1 Mantle Cell Lymphoma
BRUKINSA is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with mantle cell lymphoma (MCL)
who have received at least one prior therapy.
This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on overall response rate [see
Clinical Studies (14.1)]. Continued approval for...
